title: Bionano Announces Private Placement of Senior Secured Notes in Debt Restructuring
text: Bionano Genomics announced a private placement of senior secured convertible debentures due May 24, 2026, raising gross proceeds of $18.0 million. The financing allows the company to fully retire its outstanding senior secured convertible debt from the February 2024 financing. The debt retirement by May 2026 represents a significant balance sheet simplification and removes potential financial overhang. The transaction improves the company's capital structure by eliminating dilutive conversion features and extending clarity on debt obligations. Net proceeds from the offering will be used for general corporate purposes and to fund working capital. The financing demonstrates investor confidence in the company's ability to execute on its strategic plan. Post-transaction, Bionano's balance sheet will be significantly simplified with cleaner capital structure. The company expects the debt to be fully retired by May 2026, aligning with management guidance. This milestone removes a key risk factor for equity investors and positions the company for future capital raising.
